title: sedum rupestre subsp. reflexum
intro: Sedum rupestre subsp. reflexum, also known as Jenny's Stonecrop or Burro's Tail, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Crassulaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sedum rupestre subsp. reflexum include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as promoting wound healing and skin regeneration. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
